summary: Iteration 76 - Code Quality Refactoring Regression Tests PASSED. Verified that structural refactoring (seed.py split into 3 sub-modules, helpers_ai.py extraction, KidsCheckinModals.jsx extraction, PathwaysDialogs.jsx extraction, GroupDetailDialogs.jsx extraction, AppShellNav.js extraction) did NOT break existing functionality. All authentication flows work, all dashboards load correctly, all extracted components render and function properly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 code quality refactoring passed all tests. The following structural changes were verified: (1) Backend seed.py split into seed_commerce.py (merch+cafe), seed_pathways.py (pathways+meetings), seed_accounts.py (accounts+content) with seed.py as re-export hub, (2) Backend helpers_ai.py extracted from helpers.py containing AI integrations (Whisper, Claude, Solomon prompt), (3) Frontend KidsCheckinAdmin.jsx reduced to 808 lines with modals extracted to KidsCheckinModals.jsx (274 lines) and utils to KidsCheckinUtils.js (39 lines), (4) Frontend AbundantPathwaysAdmin.jsx reduced to 517 lines with dialogs extracted to PathwaysDialogs.jsx (127 lines), (5) Frontend GroupDetail.jsx reduced to 559 lines with dialogs extracted to GroupDetailDialogs.jsx (87 lines), (6) Frontend AppShell.jsx reduced to 492 lines with nav config extracted to AppShellNav.js (61 lines). All authentication flows work, all dashboards load correctly.
